items.claim: Luke Riley will outstrike Kai Kamaka to win by decision.

items.claim: Adrien Yanez lands significantly more strikes per minute than Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: Giannis six significant strikes per minute to 2.8 for Garbrandt.

items.claim: Adrien Yanez has a significant reach advantage over Cody Garbrandt.
Cody Garbrandt's recent performance against Xiao Long was statistically inferior despite the win.
items.quote: he trailed 59 to 28 in significant strikes

items.quote: he's got all the accolades in wrestling

items.claim: Elijah Ellison is vulnerable to being outstruck significantly.
items.quote: Ellison lost to Brando Perich by first round KO. Uh it was 29 to3 and significant strikes.

items.quote: he's still going to be undersized potentially in this fight
